code:
gantt
    title Deep Tree Echo Architecture Implementation Timeline
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat %b %Y
    
    section Phase 1: Foundation
    Development Environment Setup           :m11, 2025-11-01, 2w
    Hypergraph Memory Prototype            :m12, after m11, 8w
    Echo Propagation Basic                 :m13, after m12, 4w
    Cognitive Grammar Kernel               :m14, after m13, 4w
    Core Engine Integration                :m15, after m14, 4w
    Basic Membrane Structure               :m16, after m15, 4w
    
    section Phase 2: Integration
    Communication Protocols                :m21, after m16, 2w
    Three-Membrane Structure               :m22, after m21, 4w
    Security Infrastructure                :m23, after m22, 4w
    Synergy Orchestrator                   :m24, after m23, 6w
    
    section Phase 3: Enhancement
    Browser Automation Extension           :m31, after m24, 4w
    ML Integration Extension               :m32, after m31, 4w
    Evolution Engine Extension             :m33, after m32, 4w
    Introspection System                   :m34, after m33, 4w
    Monitoring Dashboard                   :m35, after m34, 2w
    Sensory Motor Interface                :m36, after m35, 2w
    Performance Optimization               :m37, after m36, 6w
    
    section Phase 4: Evolution
    Meta-Learning Framework                :m41, after m37, 4w
    Autonomous Adaptation                  :m42, after m41, 6w
    Structural Plasticity                  :m43, after m42, 6w
    Multi-Scale Emergence                  :m44, after m43, 10w
    
    section Buffer & Polish
    Final Testing & Documentation          :m51, after m44, 8w

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Deep Tree Echo架构制定一个完整的实施路线图。整体分成四个主要阶段：Foundation、Integration、Enhancement和Evolution，最后加上缓冲期。时间跨度大概两年左右，从2025年11月开始。
明白。Foundation阶段作为根基，我理解为需要先搭建开发环境，然后做Hypergraph Memory的原型验证？这个原型预计要两个月，是整个阶段里最长的任务。
对，Hypergraph是核心记忆机制，必须充分验证。之后Echo Propagation Basic、Cognitive Grammar Kernel、Core Engine Integration和Basic Membrane Structure这四个模块各一个月，形成完整的认知核心。
好的，Foundation阶段已经排好。Integration阶段我注意到有个Synergy Orchestrator需要六周，是这阶段最重的任务。它前面要先完成Communication Protocols、Three-Membrane Structure和Security Infrastructure。
Enhancement阶段要扩展系统能力。Browser Automation、ML Integration、Evolution Engine三个扩展模块各一个月，然后是Introspection System、Monitoring Dashboard和Sensory Motor Interface。最后Performance Optimization需要六周，这是上线前的关键调优。
Evolution阶段看起来是长期演进规划？Meta-Learning Framework之后是Autonomous Adaptation和Structural Plasticity，最后Multi-Scale Emergence要十个周，是整个项目周期最长的单个任务。
没错，Multi-Scale Emergence是系统自主涌现能力的最终验证，需要充分时间。最后Buffer & Polish阶段安排两个月做Final Testing & Documentation，确保交付质量。
确认一下整体结构：时间轴用年月格式，所有任务都是顺序依赖关系，每个阶段的最后一个任务自动衔接下一阶段的首个任务。这样整个甘特图就完整了，可以开始评审。
